design_principles: Terminal-inspired aesthetics: modular widgets, geometric typography, neon green accents.
Functional color only: Green for live/success, Red for risk/bounce.
Progressive disclosure: Show minimum needed, reveal on demand.

buttons.primary: bg-green-500 text-black hover:bg-green-400 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wide transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-gray-300 hover:text-white hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors

cards.base: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 p-4 rounded-sm flex flex-col gap-2

tables.header: bg-zinc-900 border-b border-zinc-800 text-xs font-mono uppercase text-gray-400 p-3

inputs.base: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 text-gray-200 rounded-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-green-500 focus:border-green-500 transition-all placeholder:text-zinc-600 px-3 py-2
inputs.labels: text-xs font-mono uppercase text-gray-400 mb-1 block

badges.success: bg-green-500/10 text-green-400 border border-green-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono
badges.warning: bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-400 border border-yellow-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono
badges.error: bg-red-500/10 text-red-400 border border-red-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono

dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid (Dense, functional). Top row for KPI cards, middle for trend charts, bottom for recent activity.
dashboard.kpi_cards: Must include top-left 'North Star' metric in font-mono, with a small sparkline chart on the right.
dashboard.charts: Recharts with dark mode tooltips. Lines/Bars should use #22C55E and #10B981. Grid lines should be subtle (#27272A).

hunter_workflow.active_state: Glowing green border (box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(34,197,94,0.5)) and blinking cursor effect.
hunter_workflow.completed_state: Solid green checkmark with text color muted to gray.
hunter_workflow.logs: Show a faux terminal window below the stepper with monospaced logs (e.g., '> Check DB... [SKIPPED]', '> Playwright crawl... [RUNNING]').

email_marketing.metrics: High-contrast data visualization. Green for open/reply rates, Red for bounce rates.
email_marketing.campaign_builder: Split pane layout. Left: configuration (inputs, schedule). Right: Live preview of the email.

database.actions: Hover over rows to reveal quick actions (Email, Edit, Delete).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements must transition colors smoothly. Text color must be explicitly defined on hover.
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: High contrast focus rings. `focus:ring-1 focus:ring-green-500 focus:border-green-500`.
motion_and_interactions.data_loading: Use ASCII art spinners or monospace text loading ('Loading... [|||||     ]') instead of circular spinners.

icons.style: Regular or Light weight. Use 'fill' weight for active states.

image_urls.description: Matrix movie still / dark green abstract tech

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`).
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast against dark backgrounds meets APCA standards. Use text-shadow if needed over images.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layout wrappers to ensure strict grid control, but use Shadcn for complex interactives (Select, Table, Dialog).
DO NOT use Inter font for headings. Use Chivo. Use JetBrains Mono for all data/metrics.
Implement the 7-step Hunter workflow as a custom component with terminal-like logs (e.g. '> Checking DB... [OK]').
Strictly follow the 'Control Room' dense grid approach for dashboards (small margins, full utilization of screen real estate).
Ensure the sidebar navigation is collapsible to preserve horizontal space.
Use Phosphor icons. Make sure to run the installation command.
Apply the matrix background image to the login/register screens with a heavy black overlay (bg-black/80).
